channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Rudy Giuliani’s son says dad gifted him 4 World Series rings sought by Georgia election workers
item.description: Andrew Giuliani says in court documents filed Tuesday in New York that he is actually the rightful owner of the rings because his father gave them to him as a gift in 2018.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Celeb hurricane relief: Taylor Swift donates $5 million, Tom Brady gives $100,000
item.description: A-listers including Taylor Swift and Tom Brady are donating toward hurricane relief efforts amid the devastation caused by storms Milton and Helene.
item.dc:creator: Jami Ganz, The Mercury News

item.title: Nevada high court to review decision in ex-Raiders coach Jon Gruden's lawsuit over NFL emails
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Former Las Vegas Raiders head coach Jon Gruden will get a full Nevada Supreme Court review of a lawsuit he filed against the NFL over emails leaked to the media before he resigned from the team in 2021.
item.dc:creator: KEN RITTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: After going from 106 losses to the playoffs, the Royals already are aiming for more next season
item.description: The Royals are looking forward to next season with a pronounced sense of optimism after going from a 106-loss trainwreck last year to the AL Division Series this year.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Oklahoma and Texas, one of college football's most storied rivalries, opens new chapter in the SEC
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Perhaps the only way the Oklahoma-Texas rivalry could have become even more intense happened when both joined the powerful Southeastern Conference in July. The series that began in 1900 immediately will rank with the best of the SEC’s older ones -- Alabama vs.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Prep spotlight: A leader has emerged for perennial East Bay girls water polo contender
item.description: Prep spotlight: Freedom's Hartwig learning flag football with players, Evergreen Valley's three captains, Oakland adds boys lacrosse, Pitt's flag football quarterback makes miraculous throw
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Wild hang on to beat Blue Jackets 3-2 in opener behind Boldy, Eriksson Ek and Gustavsson
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Matt Boldy and Joel Eriksson Ek scored on a strong night for the second line, Mats Zuccarello added a power-play goal and the Minnesota Wild opened the season by beating former coach Dean Evason and the Columbus Blue Jackets 3-2 on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mets postseason tickets outsell Yankees on StubHub
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – The Mets and Yankees are both looking to make a run this postseason, but the Amazins are selling more tickets than the Bronx Bombers, according to StubHub. The Mets-Phillies National League Division Series was the best-selling series of the 2024 postseason on StubHub.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, PIX 11

item.title: Bedard, Blackhawks embark on 2024-25 season Tuesday night in Utah
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Connor Bedard was one of the first players on the ice Monday. He was also one of the last to leave when practice was over. In many ways, Bedard is the same guy as he begins his second season with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lightning preseason game against Nashville canceled
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning preseason game scheduled for Monday against the Nashville Predators has been canceled due to Hurricane Milton, the team announced Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Accettulla, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Caleb Williams, Bears offense overwhelm Panthers, advance to 3-2
item.description: CHICAGO — Caleb Williams continued his improvement with a breakout game Sunday against the Carolina Panthers, as the Chicago Bears used a first-half offensive blitz to cruise to an easy victory Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ohtani homers in playoff debut and the Dodgers rally to beat the Padres 7-5 in NLDS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani hit a three-run homer in his postseason debut, Teoscar Hernández’s two-run single gave Los Angeles its first lead in a playoff game in two years, and the Dodgers beat the San Diego Padres 7-5 in their NL Division Series opener Saturday.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Who plays for the Los Angeles Clippers this year? Here's a breakdown of the roster
item.description: Yet another NBA offseason has come and gone, with some major free agent signings taking place and some big names being selected in this year’s draft.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4
